problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
